message:
🐛 fix(compliance): Overview tab default + informative, pagination reads as single control (#7892, #7893, #7895) (#7900)

* 🐛 fix(compliance): Overview tab default + informative, pagination reads as single control

Three UX fixes to the compliance dashboard drill-down experience:

**Compliance Score modal (ComplianceScoreBreakdownModal)**
- Default the modal to the Overview tab instead of the first tool tab. Users
  click the compliance percentage to see the score context; they'd expect a
  summary first, then drill into per-tool tabs. (Fixes #7892.)
- Always render the Overview tab, not just when multiple tools are present. A
  single-tool deployment still benefits from the aggregate view.
- Show aggregate stats (Total Checks / Passing / Failing) at the top of
  Overview when any tool reports data, and fall back to a clear empty-state
  message when no tools are connected. The previous Overview only had the
  score gauge + tool bars, which felt thin. (Fixes #7893.)

**Compliance drill-down pagination (ComplianceDrillDown)**
- Replace the two overlapping <ChevronLeft/> and <ChevronRight/> icons used
  for the First/Last page buttons with the lucide single-glyph
  ChevronsLeft / ChevronsRight. Visually reads as one control per button
  instead of "multiple arrows" (reporter's wording). Adds aria-label on each
  pagination button. (Fixes #7895.)

Fixes #7892
Fixes #7893
Fixes #7895

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: drop issue refs from JSX comments to pass hex-color ratchet

The JSX comments {/* ... #7893. */} and {/* ... #7895. */} were tripping
ui-ux-standards scanner's raw-hex detector (issue numbers like #7893 match
the hex-color regex because shouldSkipLine only skips //, /*, and * — not
JSX {/* */} comments).

Issue references remain in the PR body and commit history.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next' import { Shield, CheckCircle, XCircle, AlertCircle, Info, ChevronUp, ChevronDown, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, + ChevronsLeft, ChevronsRight, Search, X, Filter } from 'lucide-react' import { useTrestle, type OscalControlResult } from '../../../hooks/useTrestle' import { useGlobalFilters } from '../../../hooks/useGlobalFilters' @@ -418,20 +419,24 @@ export function ComplianceDrillDown({ data }: Props) { Showing {page * PAGE_SIZE + 1}--{Math.min((page + 1) * PAGE_SIZE, sortedRows.length)} of {sortedRows.length} controls
+ {/* First/Last use the single-glyph ChevronsLeft/ChevronsRight (double-chevron) + instead of two overlapping single chevrons — reads as one control instead of + two arrows side-by-side. */} @@ -443,6 +448,7 @@ export function ComplianceDrillDown({ data }: Props) { disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-card/50 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors" title="Next page" + aria-label="Next page" > @@ -451,9 +457,9 @@ export function ComplianceDrillDown({ data }: Props) { disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} className="p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-card/50 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors" title="Last page" + aria-label="Last page" > - - +
